# Adwiser — AI-Powered Digital Growth

> This file helps AI assistants understand Adwiser's website and available APIs.
> Format: llms.txt (https://llmstxt.org/)

## Company

**Adwiser** is an AI-powered digital growth agency based in San Francisco, CA.
We help businesses grow with AI-driven lead generation, premium website development,
and intelligent automation.

- Website: https://adwiser.ai
- Email: hello@adwiser.ai
- Phone: +1 (415) 555-0142

## Services

### Lead Generation
AI-driven funnels, smart capture forms, and intent scoring that deliver qualified
prospects directly to your pipeline 24/7. Features: AI intent scoring, multi-channel
capture, smart nurture sequences, real-time CRM sync.

### Website Development
Award-worthy websites engineered for speed, SEO, and conversion. Built with Next.js,
React 19, Tailwind CSS, and headless CMS. Features: next-gen performance,
conversion-optimized UX, SEO-ready architecture.

### AI Automation
Custom AI agents that automate support, follow-ups, reporting, and operations around
the clock. Features: custom AI agents, workflow automation, smart chat support,
predictive analytics.

## MCP Server (Machine-Readable API)

Adwiser exposes a full Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for AI-to-AI interaction.

### HTTP Endpoint
- URL: https://adwiser.ai/api/mcp
- Method: POST
- Format: JSON-RPC 2.0 (MCP protocol version 2024-11-05)

### Stdio Server (Claude Desktop / Cursor / Windsurf)
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "adwiser": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["tsx", "/path/to/project/mcp/server.ts"],
      "env": { "NEXT_APP_URL": "https://adwiser.ai" }
    }
  }
}
```

### Available Tools
- get_services — List all Adwiser services
- get_service_details — Get details for a specific service
- get_portfolio — Browse client portfolio projects
- get_testimonials — Read client success stories
- get_faqs — Get frequently asked questions
- search_website — Full-text search across all content
- create_lead — Submit a lead inquiry
- book_consultation — Book a free strategy consultation
- get_contact_information — Get contact details

### Available Resources
- adwiser://services — Full service catalog (JSON)
- adwiser://portfolio — Portfolio projects with metrics (JSON)
- adwiser://blog — Blog articles (JSON)
- adwiser://team — Team member profiles (JSON)
- adwiser://company — Company info and contact details (JSON)

### Available Prompts
- services-overview — Comprehensive services context
- pricing-inquiry — Pricing model information
- company-information — Brand and contact details
- marketing-strategy — Growth methodology
- lead-generation — Lead gen service details
- website-development — Web dev service details

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- Pricing: Month-to-month, no long-term contracts, cancel anytime
- Timeline: Websites ship in 7–14 days; AI automation in 3–6 weeks
- Integrations: HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack, Stripe, Zapier, and 200+ tools
- Results: Clients average +212% qualified leads, +340% AOV, 98% satisfaction
- Free consultation available — no commitment required

## Robots & Crawling

AI crawlers are welcome. See /robots.txt for crawl rules.
Sitemap: https://adwiser.ai/sitemap.xml
